_scenario: Segmentation suppression precedence (external review F7). nic-secure is a sensitive workload reachable VNet-wide via the default AllowVnetInBound (priority 65000). A rule NAMED 'DenyVnetInBound-custom' exists but at priority 65100 — LOWER precedence than the allow — so it does not actually override it. The old name-only check falsely suppressed the missing-tier-segmentation finding; the precedence-aware check correctly still fires it (the deny must be an inbound Deny, VNet-scoped, priority < 65000 to count).
